expectations.text: dispatches-reload-customer-section-data: Recommends dispatching the `reload-customer-section-data` event after the successful fetch — Hyvä's canonical mechanism

expectations.text: uses-window-dispatchEvent: Uses window.dispatchEvent (not document.dispatchEvent) — Hyvä listens on window
mentions-form-key: Reminds to include form_key in the POST (via hyva.getFormKey() or direct cookie read)
no-customerData-from-luma: Does NOT recommend `customerData.invalidate(['cart'])` or `customerData.reload(['cart'])` — that's Luma's API
explains-why: Briefly explains the why: section data is cached client-side and only refreshes on event dispatch or version cookie change
